notes: risk renderer responsibility moved out of report.render.capitalflow.js into report.render.risk.js
overview renderer entrypoint introduced as App.reportRender.overview.render(...) with KPI and overview-metrics responsibilities
report.js now orchestrates overview, recovery, statistics, capitalflow, and risk section renders via section-level helpers
report.render.recovery.js kept lifecycle behavior and added render/sync public aliases for orchestration-friendly calls
capitalflow render semantics were preserved; no report compute engine redesign or CSS redesign was performed
